claimBoundary: External-method baseline gate is closed for local same-split publication validation. Entries labelled smoke/protocol evidence must not be reported as official external-repo leaderboard runs.

3dgs.label: executed fixed-Gaussian / gsplat-control arm
3dgs.notes: Local executed Gaussian-control metric; broader official 3DGS and cross-method table still required for paper claim.

3dgs_smoke.label: fresh same-split gsplat 3DGS smoke
3dgs_smoke.notes: Fresh CUDA smoke proves the runner executes on local COLMAP + held-out split. It is intentionally not a quality baseline because it used one training iteration.

colmap.label: same-split COLMAP sparse SfM point smoke
colmap.notes: Sparse COLMAP point rendering through AURA's held-out camera split; smoke/protocol evidence, not a dense MVS quality baseline.

nerf.label: same-split compact NeRF smoke
nerf.notes: Compact local NeRF MLP trained on CUDA; smoke/protocol evidence, not an official nerfstudio/SOTA quality baseline.

2dgs.label: same-split CUDA 2DGS-style surfel smoke
2dgs.notes: Local COLMAP-seeded oriented-surfel splat evaluated on AURA's held-out split; protocol evidence for the 2DGS family, not the official hbb1 optimizer.

ray_traced_gs.label: same-split CUDA ray-traced-GS-style smoke
ray_traced_gs.notes: Local volumetric ray traversal through saved AURA/GS carrier tensors on the same held-out split; protocol evidence for ray-traced GS integration, not an official 3DGRUT quality run.

nextSteps: optional: replace smoke/protocol rows with official 2DGS and 3DGRUT runs on the same held-out views
optional: extend the table from the smoke frame to the full publication split
